# Allene-Based Chiral Ligands in Asymmetric Catalysis

## Ligand Design Controls Axial Chirality Transfer

Allene-based chiral ligands can tune steric pockets and electronic donation around transition metals. This section compares ligand architecture, metal identity, and asymmetric induction in catalytic addition reactions.

## Catalytic Scope and Selectivity Trends

Substrate electronics and catalyst geometry jointly shape enantioselectivity. The examples focus on asymmetric catalysis rather than materials or biological applications.
